options.name: -color
options.description: Specifies the color to be used for highlighting the clock tree path that is being traced.

options.name: -file
options.description: Specifies the name of the file in which the physical information for each instance and net in the clock path being traced will be dumped.

options.name: -from
options.description: Specifies the starting point of the highlight. If this parameter is not specified, the starting point of the highlight is the clock root of the specified sink.

options.name: -index
options.description: Specifies the range of colors that can be used to highlight the clock tree path. Default is 1

options.name: -through
options.description: Specifies the instance or pin through which the path should be traced.

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies the end point of the highlighted path.
